ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (e.g., Steel & Concrete) */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Current phase of the project */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used for the project (e.g., Tekla, Mirar) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client for the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the project */,
  "project_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool */,
  "tool_type" TEXT /* Type of the tool (e.g., Modeling, Visualization) */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase in which the tool is used */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the documentation or resource for the tool */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the tool */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., Free, Paid) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the tool was last updated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the tool (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tools" (
  "project_tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-tool association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the tool was used in the project */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tool was used in the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how the tool was used in the project */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tools_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tools_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tools_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, engineer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project in which the tool was accessed */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the tool */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the tool was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the tool access session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the tool was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the tool (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_access_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
